name: Little Andaman Lighthouse
description: A massive, towering 41-meter high lighthouse situated near the spectacular Butler Bay beach. Climbing the 200+ spiral stairs offers a jaw-dropping panoramic view of the island and ocean.
history: Constructed to guide maritime traffic through the dangerous Ten Degree Channel separating the Andamans from the Nicobars.
famousFor: Panoramic ocean views, 41m height, Ten Degree Channel.
